_publications._publicationTitle: Pathogenic neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) RNA splicing resolved by targeted RNAseq.

_contextSnippet: presence of all normal exon-exon splice junctions belonging to NF1 reference transcript NM_000267 was checked and found detectable with a median enrichment score (ERS) ~1 and >5000 reads per splice junction
details: Successfully generated RNAseq data with median >5000 reads per splice junction and median ERS ~1 for normal exon-exon junctions
